title: Relationship Between Likelihood and Sum-of-Squares Functions in Time Series
description: A comparative graph showing how the likelihood and sum-of-squares functions are mathematically related and used for parameter estimation in ARMA models.
relationships: Observed Data is used to fit an Assumed Model
The Model Parameters define the behavior of the Sum-of-Squares and Likelihood Functions
S(θ) is calculated as the sum of squared residuals
L(θ) is proportional to exp(-S(θ)/2σ²) under Gaussian assumptions
Both functions are optimized (minimized for S(θ), maximized for L(θ)) to find the Estimated Parameters
